shortDescription: Sleek 2-bedroom apartment in a boutique Scarborough Village building with rooftop terrace access.
fullDescription: Welcome to 3050 Ellesmere Road, Unit 405 in the vibrant Scarborough Village neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. All 2 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. The deep lot provides ample space for gardening, play, or future expansion. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
